title: White Netherite Items and armor
description: White netherite items armors and blocks all in one
body:
🐻‍❄️this resource pack aims to change the netherite tools and armor to be white as snow

👎you should download this pack because there are simply no good alternatives thats why i made this in the first place

◻️this pack changes every netherite releated thing including the netherite scrap wich no one else changed to white

⚔️this pack could be also used in pvp to spot others easly i personally use this for pvp but you can use this for anything!

Also works Without any mods so you dont need CIT resewn or optifine for this to work
